name: Check that the 'This user has no friends' message is shown on the 'All friends' tab on the Friend page for a user without friends
description: Check message on the empty 'All friends' tab on the Friend page
descriptionHtml: Check message on the empty 'All friends' tab on the Friend page

steps.name: Logging in the user with email: greencitytest69@hotmail.com
Clicking signin button in the header
Check that friends images block exists
Pre-condition: Locate a user with an empty friends list
Get all friend cards on the Find Friend page
Get all friend cards on the Find Friend page
Click on the All Friends tab
Get all friend cards on the All friends tab on User profile page

testStage.description: Check message on the empty 'All friends' tab on the Friend page

steps.name: Check if the message on the empty 'All friends' tab on the Friend page is correct
Get the text on the All friends tab without friends on User profile page
